title: Circuit Visualization for Debugging
description: Master quantum circuit visualization techniques using Qiskit, Cirq, and other tools to effectively debug quantum programs through visual inspection, layer analysis, and state visualization.
learningObjectives: Use multiple visualization formats (text, matplotlib, LaTeX) for circuit debugging
Perform layer-by-layer circuit analysis to isolate issues
Visualize quantum states using statevector and Bloch sphere representations
Set up checkpoints for intermediate state inspection
Generate comprehensive debug reports from circuit analysis
